name: Pati Anaadi
overview: Kishori is a determined and hardworking young girl who sells homemade sweets to support her education. Despite financial struggles, she never lets go of her dreams and continues to fight for a better future. One day, fate takes an unexpected turn when the male lead happens to taste one of Kishori’s handmade sweets. Instantly impressed by its unique flavor and the love behind it, he becomes curious about the person who made it. Driven by this curiosity, he sets out to find her. As he finally meets Kishori, he is not only drawn to her talent but also her resilience and simplicity. What begins as a simple search soon turns into a deeper connection, as he starts following her journey—unaware that this chance encounter is about to change both their lives forever.
